name: Astral-Ho-Oh (The Eternal Prismatic Sovereign)
description: A high-tier synthesis of Ho-Oh and Necrozma. Known as the Prismatic Phoenix, it governs the spectrum of life and light, its wings refracting divine energy into eternal rainbows that cleanse the entropic void.
originLore: Born from the intersection of a solar eclipse and the sacred flame. Astral-Ho-Oh was forged when Necrozma's light-refracting shards fused with the legendary phoenix's eternal plumage, creating a guardian that eternally restores the balance of light across the Aetherium.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Ho-Oh serves as the ultimate beacon of hope, turning the shadows of the void into harmonic light signals that fuel the birth of new stars.

quantumResonators.name: Sacred Fire (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Unleashes a torrent of prismatic flames that burn away dimensional corruption while restoring the life force of allies.

quantumResonators.name: Prismatic Rebirth
quantumResonators.description: Channels the light of a thousand suns to rewrite a fractured moment, essentially resetting the local entropy to a state of pure creation.
